name: InvestigationLoop
description: Investigates a request, gathers evidence, asks follow-up questions, routes mailbox items, and produces proposal artifacts from persisted docs.

steps.name: assessState
steps.description: Read the canonical investigation docs, assess gaps, and choose the next action.

steps.name: gatherContext
steps.description: Run a repository scan to capture current workspace evidence.

steps.name: generateIdeas
steps.description: Generate and refine materially different candidate approaches.

steps.name: draftProposal
steps.description: Turn the current findings into a proposal draft or revise the working draft.

steps.name: requestUserInput
steps.description: Persist a user-facing question batch and pause the loop for an answer.

steps.name: routeMessages
steps.description: Route outbound mailbox items to the correct recipient inbox.

steps.name: reviewInbox
steps.description: Review newly delivered responses and reconcile investigation docs.

steps.name: updateMemory
steps.description: Condense durable investigation context into private memory artifacts.

steps.name: complete
steps.description: Finalize proposal artifacts and stop the investigation.
